meta.title: NimbleFingers
meta.subtitle: Sorrento, BC · Week of July 5
meta.welcome: Welcome, fiddlers and pickers — here's your private practice corner for the week.

posts.title: See you at Sorrento
posts.body:
Glad to have you in class. This page is where I'll drop videos, practice tracks, and notes during and after the week — check back as we go.
For now, have a look at the listening list and warm up with Wildwood Flower.

items.title: Don't this road look rough and rocky — chorus
Don't this road look rough and rocky

items.text: Don Rigsby & Dudley Connell — Meet Me by the Moonlight
Tony Rice & Ricky Skaggs — Skaggs & Rice
